title: No Tree Punching Remastered
description: No Tree Punching Remade for 1.21.1, adding flint & copper tools along with rocks and new game mechanics to spice up your gameplay.
body:
![NTPR_FULL_LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32c566468289df226afb2a1fab89f76f575f2892.png)

### Description:
This mod is made to create a more realistic slower paced progression from minecraft. Inspired from [No Tree Punching](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-tree-punching), by [alcatrazEscapee](https://modrinth.com/user/alcatrazEscapee), it functions mostly the same as it's predecessor.

### Added & Removed:
* Correct tool needed for breaking wooden blocks
* Vanilla recipes such as wooden and stone tools are removed.
* Axe recipes for spilting wood into a few planks
* Saw recipes for spilting wood into a many planks
* Flint pickaxe, axe, shovel, hoe, & knife as a early game tool.
* New copper tools on the level of stone equipment.
* Rocks, sandstone rock, and red sandstone rocks placed throughout the world.
* Ceramic Vessel as a early game backpack.

This project will also be open source, and you can follow its progress here:
[No Tree Punching Remastered](https://github.com/WoodIsDaniel/No-Tree-Punching-Remastered)
